# ts-app — Copilot Instructions

## Project Context

ts-app is a software project. This file tells GitHub Copilot how to
behave when assisting with this codebase.

## Default Behavior

A demo project.

## Language & Framework

This project uses: TypeScript.
Package management: npm.
CI/CD: github.

## Coding Conventions

- Follow existing code style in the project.
- Write tests for new functionality.
- Use the project's domain language consistently.
- Prefer small, focused functions over large monolithic ones.

## Documentation

- Business logic rules are documented in `.agentic-scaffold/BUSINESS_LOGIC.md`.
- Architecture decisions are documented in `.agentic-scaffold/docs/adr/`.
- Agent skills and workflows are in `.agentic-scaffold/.agents/`.
